_comment: Market holiday table for scripts/calendar_rules.py. Keys are calendar groups: US (NYSE/Nasdaq/CME) and UK (LSE); dates are YYYY-MM-DD in the venue's local calendar. INCOMPLETE — seeded only with verified fixed-date + well-known 2026 closures. Add the remaining floating holidays (US: MLK, Presidents, Good Friday, Memorial, Labor; UK: spring/summer bank holidays) before relying on holiday skips, or upgrade calendar_rules.py to the `exchange_calendars` library. The weekend rule + intraday freshness + the approval gate are the backstops until then.
